Loyalty to Our Deceased Professors from Our University

12.10.2022

The names of our deceased academicians will be kept alive in the two halls of our University, where lectures and extracurricular activities are carried out intensively.

The name of the former Harvard Hall in the Student Center building was changed to Prof Dr Şaban Teoman Duralı Conference Hall.

Classroom B-23 in the Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences building was renamed as Prof Dr Ömer Faruk Harman Conference Hall.

We wish mercy to our teachers.
